description: Cross-platform ownership and location contract that separates immutable Haven 42 engine assets from user-owned configuration, workspaces, models, artifacts, credentials, caches, updates, and rollback state.

ownershipClasses.immutable-engine: Versioned application and packaged engine files; never mixed with mutable user data.
ownershipClasses.user-configuration: User preferences and provider references; preserved across update, rollback, repair, and uninstall unless separately approved.
ownershipClasses.user-content: User-selected repositories, inputs, and generated artifacts; never deleted by engine update or ordinary uninstall.
ownershipClasses.provider-data: Models and provider-owned data; retained and removed only through an explicit provider cleanup workflow.
ownershipClasses.reconstructible-cache: Safe to remove while the application is stopped; never the only copy of user content or rollback metadata.
ownershipClasses.update-state: Verified downloads, staged versions, activation journal, and retained rollback versions.
ownershipClasses.secret: Stored through the operating-system credential service, never ordinary configuration files.

windows.immutableApplication: installer-managed per-user application location; preferred default is FOLDERID_UserProgramFiles/Haven 42

linux.immutableApplication: package-manager location or XDG_DATA_HOME/haven42/versions for a per-user portable install
linux.credentials: Secret Service compatible keyring; otherwise no persistent secret

macos.immutableApplication: signed installer-managed Haven 42.app in the user-selected Applications directory

workspaceRules: repositories and user-selected inputs remain in their original user-owned locations
access requires canonical expiring path grants from the desktop IPC contract
temporary session workspaces live under state and are never treated as the source repository
an application update cannot move, rewrite, archive, or delete a workspace
